headline: Kalshi Ramps Up Effort to Build Markets for AI Computing Power
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Kalshi Inc. has created a tool that plots the future price of computing power, joining the ranks of exchange and index operators attempting to build markets around the commodity powering artificial intelligence. headline: Inflation, Warsh, and War Stoke Treasury Yields, Putting Bond Markets On Edge
summary: U.S. Treasury bond markets continued to ratchet up tension in global finance on Tuesday, with traders watching developments in the Gulf region, a key inflation report, and testimony from new Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh as yields hit multiyear highs.  Benchmark  10-year  Treasuries have risen nearly 20 basis points since the start of the month, and were last marked at 4.621%, the highest since reaching 4.66% on May 19.  The gains in crude oil prices—and their immediate impact on inflation metrics—is a crucial aspect to the move, as is the hawkish tone heard recently from Fed officials and the lack of definitive guidance under the new leadership of Warsh.

headline: GoCharting Introduces GoChamp: A New Standard in Trading Competitions Using CME Group Data
summary: NEW YORK, July 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GoCharting today announced the launch of GoChamp, a free-to-enter trading competition where retail traders use CME Group data to compete against one another in a simulated, paper trading environment built to cultivate risk management and long-term discipline.
